cards.back: A type of learning approach that involves making generalizations or drawing conclusions based on specific observations or data.
A type of learning approach that involves breaking down complex information into smaller parts, analyzing each part, and then reassembling the information to form a comprehensive understanding.
A type of inductive learning approach that involves learning from specific examples or instances, rather than from general rules or concepts.
A learning algorithm that uses an inductive approach to learn a set of rules or concepts by iteratively adding new examples and refining the existing rules.
A set of rules or concepts learned through an inductive learning approach, which can be used to make predictions or classify new examples.
